description: CompositionRed round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton that has ribbed round neckline with tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves and distressed look graphic print on the frontFittingSlimWash careMachine wash separately in cold waterUse a mild detergentDo not bleachAvoid soakingRemove promptly and line dry inside out in shadeWram iron onlyDo not iron directly on print/embroideryUpdate your casual style with this red T-shirt from probase. The slightly distressed look graphic print of the antique tv set with the words "All your friends are zombies" on the screen lends this tee a funky vibe. Team this with jeans and sneakers for a cool look, while the fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6'3”, Shoulders-19"
